TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_msmiy, title = msmiy, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/msmiy} }

S.FORM: msmiy sitrah mqwalah qu kayal qani, maymaw msmiy qwara qu llukus ru taytapang, yaqih balay qsliq.
msmiy sitrah mqwalah qu kayal qani, maymaw msmiy qwara qu llukus ru taytapang, yaqih balay qsliq.
S.PHON: ms~ɕmij s~ɕitraħ mqwalaħ qu kajal qani, majmaw ms~ɕmij qwara qu llukus~ɕ ru tajtapaŋ, jaqiħ βalaj qs~ɕliq.
